narrative:
Union Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 801 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
